---
title: "Novel forms of impact prediction: the future of combining Bayesian Hierarchical Modelling with NLP-regressors"
subtitle: "Working paper"
author: "with G. Martinelli"
description: "Combining Bayesian hierarchical modelling with NLP regressors to predict the impact of policies and interventions."
categories: ["Prediction & Simulation"]
---

Combining Bayesian hierarchical modelling with NLP regressors to predict the impact of policies and interventions.
